Interface TypeReferenceInfix

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NameReference, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, SourceElement, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ProgramConstruct, TypeReference
All Known Implementing Classes:
ArrayLength, ArrayPostDecl, ConstructorCall, CreateObject, DoBreak, EnhancedForElimination, EvaluateArgs, ExpandMethodBody, ForInitUnfoldTransformer, ForToWhile, InitArray, InitArrayCreation, IsStatic, MethodCall, MultipleVarDecl, PackageReference, PostWork, ProgramSV, ProgramTransformer, ReattachLoopInvariant, SchemaTypeReference, SpecialConstructorCall, StaticInitialisation, SwitchToIf, TypeOf, TypeRef, TypeReferenceImp, Unpack, UnwindLoop
public interface TypeReferenceInfix extends ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, NameReference
ReferencePrefix and -suffix that is admissible for outer type references.
